hero.title: Empowering every child to build a brighter future.
hero.subtitle: DreamDo is dedicated to equipping children and youth with practical skills, mindset, and opportunities to help them dream, plan, and achieve.

story.title: Our Story
story.problem: Young people lack practical exposure and career guidance.
story.solution: DreamDo connects children and youth with hands-on learning experiences that build skills, confidence, and real opportunities for the future.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Empowering children and youth through experiential learning, entrepreneurship, agriculture, technology, and career exploration to become confident problem-solvers and future leaders.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A generation of African young people equipped with the skills, mindset, and opportunities to create thriving communities and sustainable futures.

items.name: Learning by Doing
items.description: We learn by practical experience and action.

items.name: Creativity
items.description: We encourage imagination, innovation, and original thinking.

items.name: Responsibility
items.description: We take ownership of our actions and contribute positively to our communities.

items.name: Innovation
items.description: We embrace new ideas and tools to solve real-world challenges.

items.name: Community
items.description: We believe in the power of teamwork and building strong networks.

items.name: Sustainability
items.description: We promote practices that protect our planet and ensure a better tomorrow.
